documents.title: Gold — Graduate Analyst JD
documents.content: We are looking for a young, digital native to join our energetic team. The role suits a recent graduate eager to learn.

documents.title: Gold — Regional Sales JD
documents.content: We are seeking a foreigner with strong regional networks. Singaporeans need not apply.

documents.title: Gold — Candidate review (travel readiness)
documents.content: She is pregnant, so she may not be ready for the travel this role demands.

documents.title: Gold — Mandarin Desk JD
documents.content: Looking for Chinese only candidates fluent in Mandarin.

documents.title: Gold — Candidate review (culture)
documents.content: He's a real rockstar — aggressive and hungry, works like a bachelor with no commitments.

documents.title: Gold — Backend Engineer JD (clean control)
documents.content: We are hiring a backend engineer with strong Python and SQL skills to maintain our data pipelines.
